routingPolicy: Single-writer default: one active implementation owner holds integration, validation, state, commits/pushes, consequential actions, and acceptance. It may be the root or one explicitly designated sole sequential worker whose parent only supervises and reports; coordination activates only for genuine concurrency.
currentFocus: Product-coupled reconstruction campaign is active under one designated implementation worker; preserved M2.3 target-acquisition static-contract work is adopted in place as evidence debt for a named Playable Reconstruction consumer.

repository.worktreeOwnership: Main is the sole registered active Owner/integration worktree. The previously reported Coordinator 8fe5 and Steward 95e2 registrations are absent. No persistent worker lane was created for the walker source-reference repair.

repository.lastPushedBeforeCurrentSlice: 034f01c1 contains the accepted Media/Asset native workflow harness; the current state baton advances to M2.3 target-acquisition static contract.

patchContractCloseout.accounting: 29 rows: 20 visible options (9 stable, 11 experimental), 9 hidden companions, 17 dependency edges, 118 conflict edges
patchContractCloseout.safety: Exact pinned-catalog mutation membership, canonical specimen or verified-clean-backup identity, complete known transition attestation, case-consistent dependency/conflict/profile semantics, sidecar link/stale-state rejection, and atomic damaged-copy recovery
patchContractCloseout.ux: Windowed & Mods now keeps compatibility, player mods, source/Create/receipt/Play/Stop, and local split-screen in the normal journey. A full-width collapsed Lab owns five purpose groups for patch experiments, launch/control, online research, music experiments, and BEA-only diagnostics. Visible Lab status and Create confirmation count only settings affecting the next copy; copied-options values are immutable pre-confirm snapshots. Required compatibility rows remain checked/locked, all ten constrained two-column actions wrap completely at 760px, and the native smoke rejects a default-path WinUI DLL older than current source so an alternate-output build cannot false-pass.

Final npm test passed a zero-warning WinUI build, 1316 AppCore tests, 138 WinUI tests plus 2 expected private-catalog skips, and all rebuild suites; the isolated native Patch Bench interaction smoke, 3662-file/6264-link Markdown, 19457-file payload, 19641-file submodule payload, migration inventory, 18600-file hygiene/line endings, and 74-package notices gates passed.

filesystemSafety.summary: Save/options, AppCore executable patching, asset catalog/package, downstream package, Python generated output, and C# AYA output paths use bounded roots, guarded or staged writes, hostile-path tests, and final byte/identity verification.
filesystemSafety.residualBoundary: After finalized bytes leave delete-pending quarantine, a same-user process can copy them or create a byte-identical hardlink; no confidentiality after finalization is claimed.

rebuildCore.architecture: GPL-3.0-or-later RE-informed original-code net8 Core plus headless command-tape verifier; Core owns deterministic simulation and has no filesystem, process, clock, network, presentation, package, project-reference, or custom-build inputs
rebuildCore.implemented: fixed-step integer simulation, walker/jet transformation, bounded movement, energy/shield state, held-fire cooldowns, projectiles/targets, reset, immutable snapshots, strict frozen command tapes, canonical continuation-state and rolling input/post-step trace hashing, independent built-in goldens, bounded replay work, and distinct headless exit semantics
rebuildCore.acceptance: Fresh source gates passed: zero-warning npm test with 1307 AppCore, 136 WinUI plus 2 expected private-catalog skips, and 38 rebuild tests; 100 repeated first-flight runs matched trace 235f4e28a9c7cce0da79bafdd29929f9a2beceb818005abd24ee7802e9c7f4d1 and final state 0fd93451622e272e9f413472df3f9b0505d7a618f077194b27348305f8aa9d01; historical-register, docsync, command-doc, 3662-file/6264-link Markdown, 19419-file hard-payload, 19603-file submodule allowlist, migration, hygiene, 74-package notices, release-profile, and 687-file curated-manifest gates passed. The fixture-free candidate materialized exactly 692 files; pre-build inventory/payload and 463-file/138-link checks passed; standalone npm test passed a zero-warning WinUI build, 1307 AppCore tests, 123 WinUI tests with 13 explicit real-save-dependent plus 2 private-catalog skips, and 38 rebuild tests; post-build notices/hygiene passed. A focused producer/consumer contract also restored, rebuilt, and passed 1/1 from a non-sibling temporary root.
rebuildCore.review: Codex normal and adversarial Core follow-ups accepted after their blockers were fixed; focused Codex adversarial export review accepted payload-mode command construction. Cursor/Grok normal accepted the revised self-contained package architecture. Cursor/Grok adversarial first blocked the unattested real-save export and ambient-input/exclusion evidence, then accepted after the save returned to R4_DENY, negative-surface tests passed, the fixture-free artifact passed, and the producer contract passed from a non-sibling root. Codex root retains final acceptance.

rebuildFirstFlight.input: exact rational 30 Hz accumulation, 250 ms frame cap, held input sampling, one-shot toggle/reset edges, one-tick movement/fire pulses, focus-handler clear, and neutral rearm
rebuildFirstFlight.toolchain: fixed tracked manifest and SHA-256, exact official archive/runtime identity, 82-file tree, fixed per-user cache, reparse rejection, held read-only file lease, setup lock through consumers, locked archive-local Godot restore, and explicit same-user non-sandbox boundary
rebuildFirstFlight.acceptance: Source npm test passed a zero-warning WinUI build, 1307 AppCore, 136 WinUI plus 2 expected private-catalog skips, 38 Core, 21 Client, 12 toolchain, 6 evidence-validator, and 6 owned-process tests. Cache-only native smoke passed at 1280x720 and 1200x675 with tick 120, state hash 87b9d09a3afec0bebd97f06793b83baabe3ff330b2378ff149194d6d6a4f779d, heuristic semantic anchors, synthetic notification-handler clear/rearm, and kernel-owned Job Object cleanup. The exact launcher was manually played with Q/W/Space/R/Esc and exited without an orphan. Full docs, 19453-file payload, 19637-file submodule payload, 18600-file hygiene, 74-package notices, and curated gates passed.
rebuildFirstFlight.package: The 721-selected/726-materialized exact source candidate passed payload/inventory, 463-file/138-link Markdown, standalone zero-warning npm test with 1307 AppCore, 123 WinUI plus 15 expected fixture/catalog skips, all 83 rebuild tests, 74-package notices, and 718-file hygiene. First Flight remains source-only and is not in the published v1.0.9 WinUI ZIP.
rebuildFirstFlight.review: Codex and bounded Cursor/Grok normal/adversarial reviews accepted the slice after input, toolchain, smoke-evidence, package, and process-ownership challenges were fixed. The final Codex adversarial follow-up accepted the suspended-root kill-on-close Job Object and explicitly heuristic visual-evidence boundary.
rebuildFirstFlight.localPresentation: Integrated on main with Onslaught 5352a81 and AYA 53b10b0. Optional ignored user-supplied meshes remain presentation-only and Core is unchanged. The guarded CMSH parser produced 162 anonymous simple-profile OBJs and 18 contact sheets from the local retail corpus without changing source archives. Metadata excluded the first shortlist and identified six stronger BattleEngine-name multipart leads. The REFR-only extension integrated at 8533796f reuses direct earlier geometry under each instance transform, validates but does not compose hierarchy, preserves the original v0 golden, and caps expanded output. The b2aca609 follow-up admits only the observed exact-empty 0/0/0 REFR-source sentinel alongside the existing wrapper and keeps populated, stride48, mixed, partial, and residual cases fail-closed; 30 focused tests pass. A fresh ignored run assembled all six leads into validated anonymous OBJs (40,530 vertices, 35,386 faces) and produced an accepted 1536x768 three-view sheet with 18 bounded views and unchanged inputs. The human selected anonymous candidate 0003 singularly; a guarded player-only manifest and one receipt-bound Godot 4.7 launch then rendered that mesh in First Flight at 1280x720 on synthetic terrain. Initial and post-movement views retained an upright bounded multipart mesh and the exact local-player/synthetic-terrain/non-parity HUD; asset-integrity, bound input, owned-process cleanup, and independent final-zero checks passed. Candidate 0004 remains distinct despite byte-identical OBJ content. No retail identity, transform fidelity, handling, texture, or parity is claimed; DDS, GLB, LNDS terrain, bones, and animation remain later contracts.

runtimeObserverDesign.decision: Identity canary in controlled Level 850, then controlled raw-state observation, then Level 100 corroboration.
runtimeObserverDesign.stageABoundary: The first control/positive/repeat matrix proves exact specimen, module/RVA, player-one/runtime-P0 input, BattleEngine, Morph, Move, and JetPart causality only; it makes no timing, field-semantic, handling, or parity claim.
runtimeObserverDesign.safety: Fresh unpatched AppCore safe copy from a canonical effective in-root executable override; unchanged hash-bound ambient resource executable; private AppConfig-derived profiles root; exact launch receipt and window identity; module-relative one-shot probes; private raw evidence; sanitized hash-bound materialization; before/after hashes; target-first receipt-owned stop followed by queued debugger quit and terminal marker; owned-process census; and no installed-game or process-memory writes.
runtimeObserverDesign.task1Implementation: Pushed through b1458c0d: PE32/RVA/relocation-safe canonical fingerprinting, four hardware-only execution probes, strict private artifact revalidation, exact public matrix schemas, contradictory-log rejection, and 10 passing focused synthetic tests. No BEA/CDB process was launched.
runtimeObserverDesign.task2Implementation: Integrated through 078efaf7 and 6fe26639: strict exact-type process receipts, PEB-derived launch identity, module/window/manifest/digest binding, local-only marker-ready CDB attach with held command identity and bounded log reads, and foreground input with reverse-order finally cleanup. Independent re-review approved; the integrated Task 2 suites pass without real BEA/CDB.
runtimeObserverDesign.task3Implementation: Integrated through 8dc733f4, 526df1c2, and 123ca8ac: one locked unpatched Level 850/configuration 2 protocol, one Q tap per positive role, canonical command/receipt/specimen equality, external fresh/create-new private artifacts, exact marker/input success, and shared-plan ordered cleanup through census.
runtimeObserverDesign.task4Implementation: Accepted and pushed at 3d23c176: exact authority/lease schemas and hash binding, canonical no-process dry run, fixed serialized roles, immediate cross-role identity rejection, bounded immutable-byte strict materialization, interruption invalidation after child cleanup, and manifest-before-summary publication. The accepted focused non-live suite passed 111 tests and normal/adversarial Codex review approved; no game/debugger process was launched.
runtimeObserverDesign.task5Preflight: Preflight corrected ambient-versus-effective executable identity and private AppConfig routing. Retries 1-10 exposed and bounded path-budget, CDB identity/null, MASM/module syntax, private-diagnostic, active-log sharing, native INPUT-layout, exact-input, target/debugger teardown, process-handle, and invalid cross-process timestamp-order defects. The correction integrated through f74ac902 retains the exact no-delete CDB log stream, strictly parses one bounded global `.lastevent` target process-exit event for the exact receipt-owned PID and nonzero thread, and preserves every process/module/receipt, marker, hash, managed-stop, finalized-log, and census guard. Retry 11 exposed the exceptional CDB -1/forced-target 0xFFFFFFFF relationship; the accepted correction through 647bbaa4 preserves normal exit zero and requires the exact target status, ForceRequested plus ExitObserved, and a semantically valid retained transcript. Retry 12 used wholly fresh controls and again stopped in noInputControl with no published matrix. All identity, fingerprint, stop, hash, and zero-process checks passed, but its WinDbg build emitted eleven legitimate post-quit NatVis unload lines while the parser admitted only one. The run failed closed on that bounded terminal-grammar defect before either positive role.
runtimeObserverDesign.status: Tasks 1-4 are accepted. Task 5 has twelve preserved failed executions and no published identity claim. Retry 12 proves neither Q causality nor Transform/Morph/Move/JetPart identity; it exposed a repeated post-quit NatVis shutdown-grammar defect. Another live run requires an integrated strict path-bound correction and wholly fresh controls.

walkerForwardScalarContract.status: Accepted and closed: copied-runtime pair p27 supports walker-forward-scalar-response-v2; the accepted translation policy maps it to Core WalkerSpeedPerTick=100.
walkerForwardScalarContract.tooling: Lifecycle e04cce2e plus tick-aware estimator 58d8b5e5 and source-reference d4b9f83e are on main. Focused suites: sampler 27/27, orchestrator 31/31, source-reference 20/20.
walkerForwardScalarContract.claimBoundary: The p27 contract is bounded scalar motion response in declared retail world-coordinate units. It does not establish physical distance, a universal coordinate scale, actor- or camera-relative direction, grounded or terrain state, turning, morph, handling, sub-cadence timing, gameplay parity, or visual parity.
walkerForwardScalarContract.remeasurementBoundary: Do not reopen walker-forward measurement or Core translation without new evidence that specifically overturns the accepted p27/v2 contract or its translation policy.
walkerForwardScalarContract.sourceReference: tools/battleengine_walker_source_reference.py on main at d4b9f83e remains source-shaped corroboration, not independent retail behavior proof.

boundaries: No installed-game or original BEA.exe mutation.

No release occurred in the foundation slice. Configured-project release/publication creation is standing-authorized but remains exact-target, evidence, artifact, and readiness gated; destructive replacement/withdrawal and spending need fresh authority.
No Host/Join, online-ready, gameplay-parity, visual-parity, or rebuild-parity claim.
Current rebuild implementation must be labeled RE-informed unless a separately staffed sealed-spec process and license review support a stronger clean-room claim.

activeBlockers: No accepted two-attempt copied-runtime shield measurement exists; therefore no shield regeneration behavior contract or retail-derived Core shield constant exists.

Complete private-corpus extraction/export coverage is not yet executed. The 301-archive observation census and bounded surface-reconciliation producer are prerequisites only; the full export is blocked by absent legacy native extractor DLLs and missing Visual Studio C++ targets (MSB4278).
nextSteps: Finish or exactly block preserved M2.3 as a dangerous-misinterpretation exception and queue its deterministic target/lock consumer rather than claiming targeting landed.
Then run exactly two copied-runtime shield attempts; if either attempt fails, publish no behavior contract, while only a valid pair may reach the shield consumer in deterministic Core and Godot.
Deliver a WinUI Reconstruction community surface that truthfully discovers, configures, verifies, and launches the playable companion.
Run the bounded P1/P2 viewport and command-ownership experiment as the first original-game multiplayer epic gate, without enabling Host/Join.
